chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-3459 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For order on Misc. No.14620/2025 (Urgency) 2. For order on office objection Nos.1 to 7 3. For order on Misc. No.14621/2025 (Exemption) 4. For order on Misc. No.14622/2025 (Stay) 5. For hearing of main case 06.8.2025 Mr. Gohar Mehmood advocate for the petitioner -------------------------------- 1. Urgent application is allowed. 2-6. The main grievance of learned counsel for the petitioner is that an illegal construction on ground plus five on House No.A-3/3, Scheme No.24, Block-1, KDA, Gulshan-e-Iqbal, Karachi, is taken place. If so advised, he shall file a complaint through the Smart Complaint Redressal Mechanism (SCRM) before the Sindh Building Control Authority (SBCA), who shall decide the same in accordance with its own SOPs. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms alongwith listed applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
